creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Gleb,

---
PORTNAME=	xdaliclock
PORTVERSION=	2.44
(...)
PKGNAMESUFFIX=	${SUFFIX}-classic
---

You using pkgname suffix like if it was an FLAVOR.

Isn't:
---
PORTNAME=	xdaliclock-classic
PORTVERSION=	2.44
---
the correct way?

Don't know if a master/slave could be a good solution too.

Cheers,
